course.title: Election Observer Russian
course.subtitle: OSCE/ODIHR field vocabulary, English ↔ Russian
course.heroLedeSuffix: Real terminology from election-day procedure, legal framework, and reporting — the words you'll actually hear on a mission.

exercises.prompt: Выборы пройдут в следующее воскресенье.
options: Voting begins at eight o'clock in the morning.
The ballot box was sealed before the station opened.
The election will take place next Sunday.
Every voter votes in person.

exercises.prompt: Every voter has the right to vote once.
Бюллетень нужно опустить в урну для голосования.
options: Voter turnout was higher than in the previous election.
The ballot must be placed in the ballot box.
Every voter has the right to vote once.
The candidate gave a speech before the voting.

exercises.prompt: Two thousand voters are registered at this polling station.
Кандидат выступил с речью перед голосованием.
options: Two thousand voters are registered at this polling station.
Voter turnout was higher than in the previous election.
The voting booth ensures the secrecy of the vote.
The candidate gave a speech before the voting.

exercises.prompt: Voter turnout was higher than in the previous election.
Наблюдатели прибыли на участок рано утром.
options: The ballot contains the names of all candidates.
The candidate gave a speech before the voting.
The voting booth ensures the secrecy of the vote.
The observers arrived at the polling station early in the morning.

exercises.prompt: Voting begins at eight o'clock in the morning.
Урна для голосования была опечатана перед открытием участка.
options: The ballot box was sealed before the station opened.
The observers arrived at the polling station early in the morning.
The election will take place next Sunday.
Every voter has the right to vote once.

exercises.prompt: The ballot contains the names of all candidates.
Голосование является тайным и добровольным.
options: The voting booth ensures the secrecy of the vote.
The ballot box was sealed before the station opened.
Voting is secret and voluntary.
Two thousand voters are registered at this polling station.

exercises.prompt: The citizen presented a passport before receiving the ballot.
Кабина для голосования обеспечивает тайну волеизъявления.
options: Voting begins at eight o'clock in the morning.
The ballot box was sealed before the station opened.
The ballot contains the names of all candidates.
The voting booth ensures the secrecy of the vote.

exercises.prompt: The station will close at exactly eight o'clock in the evening.
Каждый избиратель голосует лично.
options: The citizen presented a passport before receiving the ballot.
Every voter votes in person.
The election will take place next Sunday.
The observers arrived at the polling station early in the morning.

lessons.title: The Election Commission
lessons.description: Vocabulary for election commissions and their members

exercises.prompt: Центральная избирательная комиссия отвечает за организацию выборов.
options: The precinct election commission consists of seven members.
The territorial election commission coordinates the work of polling stations.
The Central Election Commission is responsible for organizing elections.
The commission published the preliminary voting results.

exercises.prompt: The chairperson of the commission opened the meeting at nine o'clock.
Участковая избирательная комиссия состоит из семи членов.
options: The commission ensures compliance with electoral legislation.
The Central Election Commission is responsible for organizing elections.
The deputy chairperson temporarily performed the duties of the chairperson.
The precinct election commission consists of seven members.

exercises.prompt: The commission's secretary keeps the minutes of the meeting.
Члены комиссии подсчитали голоса после закрытия участка.
options: The deputy chairperson temporarily performed the duties of the chairperson.
The commission reviewed a complaint from the candidate's representative.
The commission members counted the votes after the station closed.
Each party has the right to send its representative to the commission.

exercises.prompt: The commission decided to extend the voting time.
Каждая партия имеет право направить своего представителя в комиссию.
options: The Central Election Commission is responsible for organizing elections.
Each party has the right to send its representative to the commission.
The commission's secretary keeps the minutes of the meeting.
The precinct election commission consists of seven members.

exercises.prompt: The territorial election commission coordinates the work of polling stations.
Комиссия опубликовала предварительные результаты голосования.
options: The commission members counted the votes after the station closed.
The territorial election commission coordinates the work of polling stations.
The commission published the preliminary voting results.
All commission members took an oath before starting their work.

exercises.prompt: The commission meeting was open to observers.
Член комиссии отказался подписать итоговый протокол.
options: The commission ensures compliance with electoral legislation.
The territorial election commission coordinates the work of polling stations.
The commission decided to extend the voting time.
A commission member refused to sign the final protocol.

exercises.prompt: The commission reviewed a complaint from the candidate's representative.
Все члены комиссии принесли присягу перед началом работы.
options: The chairperson of the commission opened the meeting at nine o'clock.
The deputy chairperson temporarily performed the duties of the chairperson.
A commission member refused to sign the final protocol.
All commission members took an oath before starting their work.

exercises.prompt: The commission ensures compliance with electoral legislation.
Заместитель председателя временно исполнял обязанности председателя.
options: The commission ensures compliance with electoral legislation.
The commission published the preliminary voting results.
The deputy chairperson temporarily performed the duties of the chairperson.
The commission members counted the votes after the station closed.

exercises.prompt: Список избирателей был вывешен на участке за неделю до выборов.
options: The error in the voter list was corrected the same day.
The voter list was posted at the polling station a week before the election.
Every citizen should check their name on the voter list.
The observers checked the accuracy of the voter list at the station.

exercises.prompt: Every citizen should check their name on the voter list.
Избиратель подал заявление об исключении из списка по прежнему адресу.
options: Only citizens who have reached eighteen years of age have the right to vote.
Duplicate entries were found in some voter lists.
The voter submitted an application to be removed from the list at the previous address.
A voter has the right to appeal a refusal to be included on the list.

exercises.prompt: Voter registration ended ten days before the vote.
В список были включены только совершеннолетние граждане.
options: The voter submitted an application to be removed from the list at the previous address.
Only adult citizens were included on the list.
The error in the voter list was corrected the same day.
The voter list is updated before every election.

exercises.prompt: The error in the voter list was corrected the same day.
Избиратель имеет право обжаловать отказ во включении в список.
options: Voter registration ended ten days before the vote.
The voter submitted an application to be removed from the list at the previous address.
A voter has the right to appeal a refusal to be included on the list.
The error in the voter list was corrected the same day.

exercises.prompt: The voter list is updated before every election.
Гражданин, проживающий за границей, тоже может зарегистрироваться.
options: The voter list was posted at the polling station a week before the election.
Only adult citizens were included on the list.
A citizen living abroad can also register.
A voter without registration can vote at their actual place of residence.

exercises.prompt: The commission cross-checked the voter list with the passport office database.
В некоторых списках избирателей обнаружили повторяющиеся записи.
options: Duplicate entries were found in some voter lists.
A voter has the right to appeal a refusal to be included on the list.
The voter list is updated before every election.
Every citizen should check their name on the voter list.

exercises.prompt: A voter without registration can vote at their actual place of residence.
Обновлённый список избирателей был передан во все участковые комиссии.
options: The voter list was posted at the polling station a week before the election.
The updated voter list was sent to all precinct commissions.
The voter list is updated before every election.
A citizen living abroad can also register.

exercises.prompt: Only citizens who have reached eighteen years of age have the right to vote.
Наблюдатели проверили точность списка избирателей на участке.
options: The voter submitted an application to be removed from the list at the previous address.
A voter has the right to appeal a refusal to be included on the list.
A citizen living abroad can also register.
The observers checked the accuracy of the voter list at the station.

exercises.prompt: Предвыборная агитация началась за месяц до дня голосования.
options: The election campaign began a month before voting day.
The party organized a series of meetings with voters in the regions.
The party placed posters throughout the city.
The campaign period officially ended at midnight.

exercises.prompt: The candidate held a meeting with voters at the local cultural center.
Закон запрещает агитацию в день голосования.
options: The law prohibits campaigning on voting day.
The observers recorded cases of illegal campaigning near the polling station.
The candidate exceeded the campaign spending limit.
The candidate held a meeting with voters at the local cultural center.

exercises.prompt: The party placed posters throughout the city.
Кандидаты приняли участие в теледебатах накануне выборов.
options: The candidate exceeded the campaign spending limit.
The observers recorded cases of illegal campaigning near the polling station.
The party placed posters throughout the city.
The candidates took part in televised debates on the eve of the election.

exercises.prompt: Election campaign financing must be transparent.
Агитационные материалы должны содержать сведения об их источнике.
options: The observers recorded cases of illegal campaigning near the polling station.
Campaign materials must contain information about their source.
The election campaign began a month before voting day.
The law prohibits campaigning on voting day.

exercises.prompt: The candidate exceeded the campaign spending limit.
Средства массовой информации обязаны освещать кампанию беспристрастно.
options: Campaign materials must contain information about their source.
The use of state resources in campaigning is prohibited by law.
The media are required to cover the campaign impartially.
The candidate exceeded the campaign spending limit.

exercises.prompt: The party organized a series of meetings with voters in the regions.
Кандидат представил свою предвыборную программу на пресс-конференции.
options: Campaign materials must contain information about their source.
The use of state resources in campaigning is prohibited by law.
The candidate presented his election platform at a press conference.
The candidate held a meeting with voters at the local cultural center.

exercises.prompt: The use of state resources in campaigning is prohibited by law.
Агитационный период официально завершился в полночь.
options: The use of state resources in campaigning is prohibited by law.
The candidate held a meeting with voters at the local cultural center.
The campaign period officially ended at midnight.
The observers recorded cases of illegal campaigning near the polling station.

exercises.prompt: The observers recorded cases of illegal campaigning near the polling station.
Каждый кандидат получил равное эфирное время на государственном телевидении.
options: The party placed posters throughout the city.
The observers recorded cases of illegal campaigning near the polling station.
Each candidate received equal airtime on state television.
The party organized a series of meetings with voters in the regions.

exercises.prompt: Международные наблюдатели прибыли в страну за неделю до выборов.
options: The observer mission published a preliminary statement the next day.
An observer's mandate does not give the right to interfere with the commission's work.
International observers arrived in the country a week before the election.
An observer has the right to move freely around the polling station.

exercises.prompt: The observer presented accreditation at the entrance to the polling station.
Долгосрочные наблюдатели следят за ходом всей избирательной кампании.
options: Long-term observers monitor the entire election campaign.
Short-term observers arrive right before voting day.
The observer presented accreditation at the entrance to the polling station.
The mission's final report contains recommendations for improving the process.

exercises.prompt: Short-term observers arrive right before voting day.
Наблюдатель имеет право свободно перемещаться по участку.
options: An observer has the right to move freely around the polling station.
Every observer must comply with the code of conduct.
An observer must remain impartial throughout the entire voting day.
Long-term observers monitor the entire election campaign.

exercises.prompt: The observer mission published a preliminary statement the next day.
Каждый наблюдатель обязан соблюдать кодекс поведения.
options: The mission sent observers to more than three hundred polling stations.
The observer noted a violation in his report.
An observer has the right to move freely around the polling station.
Every observer must comply with the code of conduct.

exercises.prompt: The observers were present during the vote count until the very end.
Мандат наблюдателя не даёт права вмешиваться в работу комиссии.
options: The mission sent observers to more than three hundred polling stations.
The mission's final report contains recommendations for improving the process.
The observer presented accreditation at the entrance to the polling station.
An observer's mandate does not give the right to interfere with the commission's work.

exercises.prompt: National observers worked together with their international colleagues.
Наблюдатель отметил нарушение в своём отчёте.
options: An observer's mandate does not give the right to interfere with the commission's work.
The observer presented accreditation at the entrance to the polling station.
The observer noted a violation in his report.
Long-term observers monitor the entire election campaign.

exercises.prompt: The mission sent observers to more than three hundred polling stations.
Наблюдатель должен оставаться беспристрастным на протяжении всего дня голосования.
options: The observer noted a violation in his report.
Long-term observers monitor the entire election campaign.
The observers were denied access to the vote-count protocol.
An observer must remain impartial throughout the entire voting day.

exercises.prompt: The mission's final report contains recommendations for improving the process.
Наблюдателям было отказано в доступе к протоколу подсчёта голосов.
options: An observer has the right to move freely around the polling station.
Long-term observers monitor the entire election campaign.
The observer mission published a preliminary statement the next day.
The observers were denied access to the vote-count protocol.
